name: Employment Agreement
description: A contract between an employer and employee outlining the terms and conditions of employment.

sections.title: Parties
sections.content: This Employment Agreement ("Agreement") is entered into as of {{effective_date}} between {{employer_name}}, located at {{employer_address}} ("Employer"), and {{employee_name}}, residing at {{employee_address}} ("Employee").

sections.title: Position and Duties
sections.content: Employer agrees to employ Employee in the position of {{job_title}}, commencing on {{start_date}}. Employee shall perform the duties and responsibilities customarily associated with such position, as well as such other duties as may be reasonably assigned by Employer from time to time. Employee shall devote their full professional time, attention, and energies to the performance of their duties.

sections.title: Employment Type
sections.content: This is a {{employment_type}} position. Employee's employment with Employer is at-will, meaning either party may terminate this Agreement at any time, with or without cause, subject to the notice requirements set forth herein.

sections.title: Compensation
sections.content: Employer shall pay Employee an annual salary of {{salary_amount}}, payable {{pay_frequency}} in accordance with Employer's standard payroll practices. Employer shall withhold all applicable federal, state, and local taxes and other required deductions from Employee's compensation.

sections.title: Benefits
sections.content: Employee shall be entitled to participate in all employee benefit programs that Employer generally makes available to its employees, subject to the terms and conditions of such programs. Employee shall accrue {{vacation_days}} days of paid vacation per calendar year, subject to Employer's vacation policies.

sections.title: Confidentiality
sections.content: Employee acknowledges that in the course of employment, Employee will have access to confidential and proprietary information of Employer ("Confidential Information"). Employee agrees to maintain the confidentiality of all Confidential Information during and after employment, and not to use or disclose such information without Employer's prior written consent.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.content: All inventions, discoveries, developments, improvements, innovations, and works of authorship (collectively, "Inventions") that Employee conceives, develops, or reduces to practice during employment that relate to Employer's business or result from work performed for Employer shall be the sole and exclusive property of Employer. Employee hereby assigns to Employer all rights, title, and interest in and to such Inventions.

sections.title: Non-Competition and Non-Solicitation
sections.content: For a period of {{non_compete_months}} months following the termination of employment, Employee shall not: (a) engage in any business activity that directly competes with Employer's business within the geographic areas where Employer operates; (b) solicit or hire any of Employer's employees; or (c) solicit any of Employer's clients or customers for competitive purposes.

sections.title: Termination
sections.content: Either party may terminate this Agreement at any time upon {{notice_period_days}} days written notice to the other party. Employer may terminate this Agreement immediately for cause, including but not limited to: material breach of this Agreement, gross misconduct, dishonesty, or violation of company policies. Upon termination, Employee shall receive all earned but unpaid compensation through the date of termination.

sections.title: Governing Law
sections.content: This Agreement shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the State of {{governing_law_state}}, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.

sections.title: Entire Agreement
sections.content: This Agreement constitutes the entire agreement between the parties with respect to the subject matter hereof and supersedes all prior agreements, understandings, and representations relating to Employee's employment. This Agreement may not be modified except by a written instrument signed by both parties.

sections.title: Signatures
sections.content:
IN WITNESS WHEREOF, the parties have executed this Employment Agreement as of the date first written above.

{{employer_name}}
Signature: ___________________________
Name: ___________________________
Title: ___________________________
Date: ___________________________

Employee: {{employee_name}}
Signature: ___________________________
Date: ___________________________
